meta.name: GQ-6 Gratitude Questionnaire
meta.description: The GQ-6 is a 6-item self-report measure of the grateful disposition.
meta.author: McCullough, Emmons & Tsang (2002)
meta.reference: McCullough ME, Emmons RA, Tsang JA. The grateful disposition: a conceptual and empirical topography. J Pers Soc Psychol. 2002;82(1):112-127.
meta.instruction: Using the scale below, indicate how much you agree with each statement.

questions.text: I have so much in life to be thankful for
If I had to list everything that I felt grateful for, it would be a very long list
When I look at the world, I do not see much to be grateful for
I am grateful to a wide variety of people
As I get older I find myself more able to appreciate the people, events, and situations that have been part of my life history
Long amounts of time can go by before I feel grateful to something or someone

ranges.label: Low Gratitude
suggestions: Record 3 things you are grateful for each day
Write a gratitude letter to someone who helped you

ranges.label: Moderate Gratitude
suggestions: Express appreciation to others more often
